summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pick Divergence Analysis system (Fix 1+2): engine_pick vs user_pick separation, divergence comparator with engine_result/user_result/delta/line_difference, calibration endpoints, and UI integration. All 43 pick_divergence_analysis tests pass, 8 fail-soft tests pass, 1496 global tests pass without regressions. Backend endpoints return correct structures. Frontend calibration page loads correctly with KPIs, and history page has functional backfill modal.
passed_tests: pytest tests/test_pick_divergence_analysis.py: 43/43 tests pass (parse_pick MLB+football, settle_pick_against_score, compute_divergence, 4 canonical cases)
pytest tests/test_hydrate_team_offensive_roster_failsoft.py: 8/8 fail-soft tests pass (db=None, cache_get/put errors handled gracefully)
pytest tests/: 1496/1496 global tests pass without regressions

GET /api/calibration/summary?days=30: Returns 200 with correct structure (engine, user, followed_engine_rate, delta_breakdown, avg_line_protection, engine_won_user_lost, engine_lost_user_won, total_picks)
GET /api/calibration/divergences?days=30&limit=5: Returns 200 with array of divergence items
POST /api/picks/track: Auto-calculates divergence when actual_market/actual_line provided with final_score, stores engine_result and user_result
POST /api/picks/track with None actual_*: Backend never throws 500, correctly assumes followed_engine=true
PATCH /api/picks/{pick_uid}/user-bet: Updates actual_bet, recomputes divergence with engine_result and user_result
Frontend /dashboard/calibration: Route accessible under ProtectedShell, loads without console errors

Frontend calibration page: Shows KPIs (PICKS REGISTRADOS, SIGUIERON AL ENGINE, PROTECCIÓN MEDIA), Engine card (Precisión del Engine), User card (Tu Precisión), Divergence panel (Engine vs Tú divergencias)
Frontend header: Has 'Calibración' tab with data-testid='nav-calibration' that navigates correctly
Frontend /history: Has backfill pencil buttons with data-testid='row-backfill-N' (found 60 buttons)
Frontend UserBetBackfillModal: Opens correctly when clicking backfill button, shows form fields (Mercado, Lado, Línea, Cuota) with Cancelar/Guardar buttons
